title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!
